notes: Added isPendingMember and cancelPendingInvitation to MarmotContextValue. Cancel logic is extracted to cancelInvitationImpl.ts for unit testability (MarmotContext is hard to render). sendAnnouncement is an optional callback parameter — MarmotContext cannot call useChatStore() directly since it is mounted above ChatStoreProvider in the tree. Tests cover: happy path, commit-throws, already-not-a-member (raceDetected), race-guard (profile just arrived). All ACs (CPI-10 through CPI-14) verified. No blocking issues.
